GEO.usage: Use as primary term for AI-era optimization
GEO.note: AEO acceptable in historical context or when referencing older materials

citation.definition: When an AI system references or quotes content from a source
citation.usage: The primary success metric for GEO

agentic commerce.definition: AI agents autonomously completing purchase transactions

share of voice.definition: Percentage of citations a brand receives relative to competitors
share of voice.usage: Always define on first use in each chapter

offsite influence.definition: Third-party signals that shape AI perception of brand

prompt bank.definition: Curated set of queries used to measure AI visibility

exceptions: Technology Reference Architectures (Appendix A) may use specific product names
Case studies and examples may reference real companies

tone.description: Expert guidance that enables immediate action

characteristics.example_good: Use a minimum of 400 prompts for pilot measurement.
characteristics.example_bad: You might want to consider using around 400 prompts or so.

characteristics.description: Focus on what to do, not just what to know
characteristics.example_good: Step 1: Export your product catalog. Step 2: Extract key entities.
characteristics.example_bad: It's important to understand your product catalog.

characteristics.description: Lead with the main point, details follow
characteristics.example_good: GEO success requires three capabilities: content authority, structured data, and measurement infrastructure.
characteristics.example_bad: When thinking about GEO, there are many factors to consider, and among these factors, some are more important than others...

characteristics.example_good: A typical retail client sees 15-25% SOV improvement in the first 90 days.
characteristics.example_bad: SOV improvements can vary based on many factors.

avoid: Passive voice where active is clearer

lists.bulleted: Use for unordered items, features, considerations
lists.numbered: Use for sequential steps, prioritized items, ranked options
lists.parallelism: All items in a list should have parallel grammatical structure

tables.usage: Use for comparisons, matrices, structured data

code_blocks.usage: Configuration examples, API snippets, structured data
code_blocks.language_tags: Always specify language for syntax highlighting
code_blocks.comments: Include explanatory comments for complex examples

warning.format: Brief statement of what to avoid and why

tip.usage: Best practices, pro tips, efficiency gains

chapter_structure: Next steps (where to go from here)

process_pattern.structure: Step number + action verb + object + details

images.format: Describe the content and purpose, not just 'diagram'

color.meaning: Never convey information by color alone
